entities.name: WOUND TUMOR VIRUS
entities.description: A virus that causes wound tumors in plants.

entities.name: LEAFHOPPER
entities.description: An insect that serves as a vector for the wound tumor virus.

entities.description: Specialized bacteria that cause plant diseases.

entities.name: MYCOTOXINS
entities.description: Toxic secondary metabolites produced by fungi.

entities.name: BARLEY YELLOW DWARF VIRUS
entities.description: A virus that causes disease in cereal crops.

entities.name: CEREAL CROPS
entities.description: Agricultural crops grown for their edible seeds.

entities.name: OTTAWA
entities.description: City in Canada where Ramesh Chandra Sinha died.

entities.description: City in India where Ramesh Chandra Sinha was born.

entities.name: DETECTION TOOLS

entities.name: IDENTIFICATION OF MULTIPLICATION SITES
entities.description: The process of identifying where the wound tumor virus multiplies within its vector.

entities.name: DISEASES
